title: High-risk provider cohort
notes: Pre-registration record. The composite weights (1.0 / 0.8 / 1.0 / 0.4) and the high (>=1.0) and medium (>=0.5) bucket thresholds are public on this page before the per-NPI cohort is computed. Numbers populate when `analysis/high_risk_cohort.py` runs against the pinned 2026-04-09 NPD release. CSV export at /api/v1/findings/high-risk-cohort-export.csv will be capped at 10,000 rows by score; the full cohort is available via the weekly refresh artifact. Composite score is a data-quality flag aligned with 42 CFR § 455.436 federal database checks, NOT a fraud determination.
